metadata.name: servicenow__activity_summary
metadata.comment: Each record represents aggregate task, problem, change, incident, and change request data by varying grains including update date, status, priority, impact, and urgency.

task_updated_date.name: task_updated_date
task_updated_date.comment: The day the task last got updated.

task_state.name: task_state
task_state.comment: Current state or status of the task (e.g., in progress, on hold, closed).

priority.name: priority
priority.comment: Priority level assigned to the task. The priority field is automatically calculated based on the values of impact and urgency. This determines the sequence in which the record should be resolved.

impact.name: impact
impact.comment: Assessment of the impact that completing or not completing the task may have. This is the business loss and potential damage (for example, financial, customer, regulation, security, reputation, brand) caused by the incident

urgency.name: urgency
urgency.comment: Level of urgency associated with the record. Speed at which the business expects the record to be resolved.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: Indicates the schema which the field originated. This is especially important when leveraging the union schema feature.

total_active_problem_tasks.name: total_active_problem_tasks
total_active_problem_tasks.comment: Total number of active problem tasks

total_active_change_tasks.name: total_active_change_tasks
total_active_change_tasks.comment: Total number of active change tasks

total_incidents_caused_by_problems.name: total_incidents_caused_by_problems
total_incidents_caused_by_problems.comment: Total number of incidents caused by associated problems

average_minutes_open_to_close.name: average_minutes_open_to_close
average_minutes_open_to_close.comment: Average number of minutes between the time that the task was opened to the time that the task was closed.

total_tasks_made_slas.name: total_tasks_made_slas
total_tasks_made_slas.comment: The count of total tasks where is_made_sla = True

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: servicenow__change_request_enhanced
metadata.comment: Each record represents a change request with additional information about users who have interacted with it, pertinent task data, and relevant timestamps.

change_request_type.comment: The type or category of the changes outlined in the current record, indicating the nature or purpose of the modifications.

change_request_created_at.comment: Date and time when the record was initially created.

change_request_updated_at.name: change_request_updated_at
change_request_updated_at.comment: Date and time when the record was last updated.

change_request_updated_date.name: change_request_updated_date

change_request_start_date.comment: The requested start date for the implementation or execution of the changes associated with the current record.

change_requested_by_date.comment: The date the change is requested for.

change_requested_by_link.comment: A link to the person or entity who requested or initiated the changes associated with the current record.

change_requested_by_value.comment: The name or identifier of the person or entity who requested or initiated the changes associated with the current record.

change_requestor_email.comment: Email address associated with the record.

change_requestor_manager_value.name: change_requestor_manager_value
change_requestor_manager_value.comment: The name or identifier of the user's manager or supervisor.

change_requestor_department_value.name: change_requestor_department_value
change_requestor_department_value.comment: Value representing the department associated with the system user.

change_requestor_name.name: change_requestor_name
change_requestor_name.comment: The system username or identifier for the user.

change_requestor_roles.name: change_requestor_roles
change_requestor_roles.comment: The roles assigned to the user in the system or organization.

change_request_review_date.name: change_request_review_date
change_request_review_date.comment: The date when the record was reviewed or evaluated.

change_request_review_status.name: change_request_review_status
change_request_review_status.comment: The status or outcome of the review process associated with the current record.

review_comments.name: review_comments
review_comments.comment: Comments or feedback provided during the review process for the changes associated with the current record.

change_plan.name: change_plan
change_plan.comment: Information about the plan or process for implementing the changes associated with the current record.

backout_plan.name: backout_plan
backout_plan.comment: Information about the plan or process for backing out or undoing the changes associated with the current record.

chg_model_link.name: chg_model_link
chg_model_link.comment: A link to the change model or template associated with the change request or change record.

chg_model_value.name: chg_model_value
chg_model_value.comment: The name or identifier of the change model or template linked to the change request or change record.

change_request_close_code.name: change_request_close_code
change_request_close_code.comment: The code or identifier associated with the closure or resolution.

conflict_last_run.name: conflict_last_run
conflict_last_run.comment: The timestamp indicating when the conflict detection was last run for the change request or change record.

conflict_status.name: conflict_status
conflict_status.comment: The status or outcome of the conflict detection process for the change request or change record.

change_request_phase.name: change_request_phase
change_request_phase.comment: The phase or stage of the change request or change record within the change management process, indicating its progress or status.

change_request_phase_state.name: change_request_phase_state
change_request_phase_state.comment: The current state or status of the phase associated with the change request or change record.

dv_change_request_phase_state_label.name: dv_change_request_phase_state_label
dv_change_request_phase_state_label.comment: The display value (viewable in the ServiceNow UI), or human-readable text, for a titular choice option.

change_request_implementation_plan.name: change_request_implementation_plan
change_request_implementation_plan.comment: Information about the plan or process for implementing the changes associated with the current record.

change_request_justification.name: change_request_justification
change_request_justification.comment: The reasoning or justification behind the changes associated with the current record, providing context or explanation for the modifications made.

is_change_request_on_hold.name: is_change_request_on_hold
is_change_request_on_hold.comment: Indicates whether the change is currently on hold or paused.

change_request_on_hold_reason.name: change_request_on_hold_reason
change_request_on_hold_reason.comment: The reason or rationale for placing the associated record on hold.

on_hold_task.name: on_hold_task
on_hold_task.comment:
A link to the task or activity that indicates the current record is on hold, specifying the task associated with the 
hold status.

outside_maintenance_schedule.name: outside_maintenance_schedule
outside_maintenance_schedule.comment: Indicates whether the changes associated with the current record fall outside the regular maintenance schedule or window.

is_production_system.name: is_production_system
is_production_system.comment: Indicates whether the changes associated with the current record are intended for the production environment or system.

change_request_reason.name: change_request_reason
change_request_reason.comment: The reason or rationale behind the changes requested by the current record, providing context or explanation for the modifications made.

change_request_risk.name: change_request_risk
change_request_risk.comment: The level of risk associated with the changes, indicating the potential impact or consequences of implementing the modifications outlined in the current record.

dv_change_request_risk_label.name: dv_change_request_risk_label
dv_change_request_risk_label.comment: The display value (viewable in the ServiceNow UI), or human-readable text, for a titular choice option.

risk_impact_analysis.name: risk_impact_analysis
risk_impact_analysis.comment: An analysis or assessment of the impact or consequences of the changes outlined in the current record.

change_request_scope.name: change_request_scope
change_request_scope.comment: The scope or extent of the changes outlined in the current record, specifying the areas or components affected by the modifications.

change_request_test_plan.name: change_request_test_plan
change_request_test_plan.comment: Information about the plan or process for testing the changes associated with the current record.

is_change_request_unauthorized.name: is_change_request_unauthorized
is_change_request_unauthorized.comment: Indicates whether the changes associated with the current record were made without proper authorization or approval.

cab_date.name: cab_date
cab_date.comment: The date of the Change Advisory Board (CAB) meeting associated with the change request or change record.

cab_date_time.name: cab_date_time
cab_date_time.comment: The date and time of the Change Advisory Board (CAB) meeting associated with the change request or change record.

cab_delegate_link.name: cab_delegate_link
cab_delegate_link.comment:
A link to the person or entity delegated to represent or act on behalf of the Change Advisory Board (CAB) in relation 
to the change request.

cab_delegate_value.name: cab_delegate_value
cab_delegate_value.comment:
The name or identifier of the person or entity delegated to represent or act on behalf of the Change Advisory Board (CAB) 
in relation to the change request.

cab_recommendation.name: cab_recommendation
cab_recommendation.comment: The recommendation or decision made by the Change Advisory Board (CAB) regarding the change request.

is_cab_required.name: is_cab_required
is_cab_required.comment: Indicates whether the Change Advisory Board (CAB) approval is required for the change request.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: Indicates whether the task record has been synchronized by the Fivetran connector.

change_request_days_created_to_start.name: change_request_days_created_to_start
change_request_days_created_to_start.comment: The days lapsed from when the change request was created to when it was started

change_request_days_requested_by_to_star.name: change_request_days_requested_by_to_start
change_request_days_requested_by_to_star.comment: The days lapsed from when the change request was requested to when it was started

change_request_days_created_to_reviewed.name: change_request_days_created_to_reviewed
change_request_days_created_to_reviewed.comment: The days lapsed from when the change request was created to when it was reviewed

total_related_tasks.name: total_related_tasks
total_related_tasks.comment: The total number of tasks tied to this record.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: Indicates the schema which the field originated. This is especially important when leveraging the union schema feature.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_servicenow__task

assignment_group_value.comment: Value representing the assignment group associated with the task.

business_duration_sec.name: business_duration_sec
business_duration_sec.comment: The duration of the task in terms of business time (in seconds).

business_service_link.name: business_service_link
business_service_link.comment: Link to the business service associated with the task.

business_service_value.name: business_service_value
business_service_value.comment: Value representing the business service associated with the task.

calendar_duration.comment: The duration of the task in terms of calendar time. Represented as an epoch timestamp, or the number of seconds from midnight, January 1, 1970.

calendar_duration_sec.comment: The duration of the task in terms of calendar time (in seconds).

delivery_plan_value.name: delivery_plan_value
delivery_plan_value.comment: Value representing the delivery plan associated with the task.

delivery_task_link.comment: Link to the delivery task associated with the task.

delivery_task_value.name: delivery_task_value
delivery_task_value.comment: Value representing the delivery task associated with the task.

task_description.comment: Detailed description or information about the task.

task_due_date_at.comment: The date by which the task is expected to be completed.

escalation.comment: Information about any escalation procedures or steps related to the task.

expected_start.comment: The expected start date or time for the task.

task_follow_up_at.comment: Timestamp of when follow up was applied to the task.

group_list.comment: List of groups associated with the task.

impact.comment: Assessment of the impact that completing or not completing the task may have. This is the business loss and potential damage (for example, financial, customer, regulation, security, reputation, brand) caused by the incident

knowledge.name: knowledge
knowledge.comment: Indication of whether the task is associated with knowledge or documentation.

location_link.name: location_link
location_link.comment: Link to the location associated with the task.

location_value.name: location_value
location_value.comment: Value representing the location associated with the task.

is_made_sla.name: is_made_sla
is_made_sla.comment: Indicates whether the task was completed within the agreed-upon Service Level Agreement (SLA).

task_number.name: task_number
task_number.comment: Unique identifier or reference number assigned to the task.

task_opened_at.name: task_opened_at
task_opened_at.comment: Date and time when the task was initially opened.

opened_by_link.name: opened_by_link
opened_by_link.comment: Link to the user who initially opened the task.

opened_by_value.name: opened_by_value
opened_by_value.comment: Value representing the user who initially opened the task.

task_order.name: task_order
task_order.comment: Order or sequence number associated with the task.

parent_link.name: parent_link
parent_link.comment: Link to the parent task or record associated with the task.

parent_value.name: parent_value
parent_value.comment: Value representing the parent task or record associated with the task.

priority.name: priority
priority.comment: Priority level assigned to the task. The priority field is automatically calculated based on the values of impact and urgency. This determines the sequence in which the record should be resolved.

reassignment_count.name: reassignment_count
reassignment_count.comment: Count of how many times the task has been reassigned.

rejection_goto_link.comment: Link to the record or step to be followed in case of task rejection.

rejection_goto_value.name: rejection_goto_value
rejection_goto_value.comment: Value representing the record or step to be followed in case of task rejection.

route_reason.name: route_reason
route_reason.comment: Reason or criteria for routing the task to a particular user or group.

service_offering_link.comment: Link to the service offering associated with the record.

service_offering_value.name: service_offering_value
service_offering_value.comment: Value representing the service offering associated with the record.

short_description.name: short_description
short_description.comment: Brief or concise summary of the record.

sla_due.name: sla_due
sla_due.comment: Date and time by which the record is expected to meet the Service Level Agreement (SLA).

task_state.name: task_state
task_state.comment: Current state or status of the task (e.g., in progress, on hold, closed).

sys_class_name.comment: Name of the table in which the record is stored.

sys_created_by.name: sys_created_by
sys_created_by.comment: User who initially created the record.

sys_domain_link.name: sys_domain_link
sys_domain_link.comment: Link to the system domain associated with the record.

sys_domain_path.name: sys_domain_path
sys_domain_path.comment: Path of the system domain associated with the record.

sys_domain_value.name: sys_domain_value
sys_domain_value.comment: Value representing the system domain associated with the record.

sys_mod_count.name: sys_mod_count
sys_mod_count.comment: Number of times the record has been modified.

sys_updated_by.comment: User who last updated or modified the record.

task_effective_number.name: task_effective_number
task_effective_number.comment: Effective number or identifier associated with the task.

universal_request_link.name: universal_request_link
universal_request_link.comment: Link to the universal request associated with the task.

universal_request_value.name: universal_request_value
universal_request_value.comment: Value representing the universal request associated with the task.

upon_approval.name: upon_approval
upon_approval.comment: Actions or steps to be taken upon the approval of the task.

upon_reject.name: upon_reject
upon_reject.comment: Actions or steps to be taken upon the rejection of the task.

urgency.name: urgency
urgency.comment: Level of urgency associated with the record. Speed at which the business expects the record to be resolved.

watch_list.name: watch_list
watch_list.comment: List of users or groups who are monitoring or "watching" the task.

wf_activity_link.name: wf_activity_link
wf_activity_link.comment: Link to the workflow activity associated with the task.

wf_activity_value.name: wf_activity_value
wf_activity_value.comment: Value representing the workflow activity associated with the task.

work_end.comment: Date and time when the work on the task is scheduled to end.

work_notes.comment: Notes or comments recorded during the work on the task.

work_notes_list.comment: List of work notes recorded during the task's lifecycle.

work_start.comment: Date and time when the work on the task is scheduled to start.
